_note: Curated list — the FHR portfolio rotates quarterly. A brand on this list does not guarantee every property under that brand is FHR-eligible; verify per property at amextravel.com.

_rotation_cautions.frequency: Properties enter and exit the FHR program with no public schedule. Two-week rotation gaps have been observed.
_rotation_cautions.regional_variance: A brand may be FHR in Europe but not the same brand in Asia for the same chain.
_rotation_cautions.verification_url: https://thehotelscollection.com (Amex Travel — login required for live booking)
_rotation_cautions.last_updated_basis: 2026-Q1 portfolio snapshot; treat as directional only
